storyInfo: The people of Kjerag do not yield easily to Caster's military pressure. Degenbrecher is encircled by the Trilby Ashers as she protects Ratatos. Arctosz leads his men in facing off against their foe at the border. Enciodes carries out his final preparations in his factory.

attributes.content: I am in position.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: As Her Grace's latest instructions state, Ratatos's feigned death must have a reason. She is most likely carrying important information on her person, and is to be captured alive.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: This is the front, the courtyard is empty. Prepare for direct contact.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: Do not attract attention. End it quick.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: The only thing to watch out for is the Black Knight, who is most likely still here.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: But where is she?
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: The intruder looks about warily, holding his weapon tight.
Not good!
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: A black degenbrecher flies at unbelievable speed towards him. The intruder is sent flying by the incredible force, slamming against the walls.
Ah!
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: I heard... more fighting outside. What in the blazes is going on?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Quiet down!
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: The trickiest enemies for us to handle are outside right now. Degenbrecher's risking her life to protect us.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: The only thing you can do right now is sit down, shut up and not be discovered.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I... I heard the broadcast say that I'm a hostage abducted by Kjerag? Why...
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Heh... Your fellow Victorians got their weapons out and started up their tanks. They're not letting anything out of this place.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: So are they here to rescue you, or are they here to keep people in the know locked up in here so they can get their other plans done? The answer is obvious.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You mean they're using my rescue as an excuse to invade Kjerag...?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: It's what you said... and it seems reality agrees with you.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: ...How did it all come to this?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: If you've got a way to get the information out, you can ask your fellow countrymen that question.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: When I came to this place, I thought I could help the oppressed people. With my camera and my words, I would be able to let more people know about the true Kjerag.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: I believed all that I did had meaning...
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: ...Should I be thanking you for your kindness or something?
attributes.name: Ratatos
Ratatos
attributes.content: Alright, alright, I'll treat you as an actual kind-hearted lady then.

attributes.name: Ratatos
attributes.content: So don't play dumb with me now. Why do you think what you've seen is the 'true Kjerag'?
And who do you think is doing the oppressing here?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Melting snow atop the roof becomes water dripping into the courtyard, causing ripples in the intruder's pooling blood.
Before him, the face shrouded in light looks right back at him.
Within the great hall, the candle flames are like chained bloodthirst, raging and roiling.
Such power... No wonder the reports on Kjerag emphasized the Black Knight's presence.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: I knew you people would try to sneak in.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: You... Hmph, to tell you the truth, I can't tell which of you is which underneath those masks.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: That colleague of yours who came to Kjerag before, surely he told you this land is not one you can trample as you please?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Indeed. Your fame is known to us.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: We made sure to make ample preparations.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: So you intend to win through numbers.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: None of us could hope to claim victory over you. It is only a mission, nothing more.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: Your clothes may mark you as elites.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But here's something you wouldn't know without feeling some pain—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: If you wish to pass, it will only be as a corpse.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Come.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: It's rare that I have the chance to go all-out.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: ...I suppose I should consider you all willing to die.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: She takes up a killing stance as the air is filled with the muffled cries of unsheathed weapons.
With drawn blades and cold gleams, they slowly step forward, stepping onto the puddles reflecting a muddled sky.
Upon this holy ground, a savage melee is about to begin.
The humid air warms and dries. Falling snow melts. Steam rises. Droplets splash about.
From the clash of steel against flesh come sparks of scarlet.
Hah—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Not bad! Again!
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: ...I never thought it would be like this.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Should I not have come to Kjerag, Madame Ratatos?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: That's a question you need to answer yourself, along with your country.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: On the Kjerag side of things, I might have also considered using one as pure-hearted as you, so I can't really blame Victoria for doing it.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: ...So what exactly does the information I have mean to Victoria, and to Kjerag?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: They're just making a fuss out of you to make it look like the facts are already settled. Don't take it too seriously.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: We're hostages, nothing more.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I feel like this is all rather absurd.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Well, that's one way to sum it up. If your camera still works, this would make some excellent material for you.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: If... I walked out that door, the rest of you would be fine, right?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: If you did, they'd point their swords at you and confiscate all your material. You yourself might even disappear without a trace, with nobody else knowing what had happened to you.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: With things having come to a head... You're the one who's meant to understand them the most, not me.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: So are we supposed to sit here and do nothing?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: I don't think the Victorians want to lose you, Miss Hostage.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Just calm down, wait, and then...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: I don't care what your plan is, Enciodes, it's time to put it into action.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Reporting in!
attributes.name: Paleroche Warrior

attributes.content: We've built some temporary fortifications, just like you ordered, Sir Arctosz.
attributes.name: Paleroche Warrior

attributes.content: The enemy fleet hasn't fired yet. Instead, they're marching towards a place three clicks from us. How should we respond?
attributes.name: Paleroche Warrior

attributes.content: Our explosives reserves?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We've moved over all we could. We'll be risking our lives, but at the very least, we can delay the Victorian advance for a while.
attributes.name: Paleroche Warrior

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Go get the troops in formation! Meanwhile, I'll have a chat with these Victorians!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The ship stops in front of him, its dark gray armor plating reflecting the sun's light. This is one of the rare moments in Arctosz's life he is forced to look up.
Who's your commander? Tell him to come out for a chat!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: My commanding officer does not wish to come to blows with you, Arctosz Paleroche.
attributes.name: Victorian Officer

attributes.content: That all depends on why you've come to Kjerag. Don't tell me you're all just lost in the woods.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Her Grace has already made everything clear in her open letter. We must defend Victoria's interests while helping Kjerag stabilize following the Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Victorian Officer

attributes.content: All we ask is for the mastermind behind Kjerag's troubles, Enciodes Silverash, to receive the trial he deserves, which I believe is in line with Clan Paleroche's thinking.
attributes.name: Victorian Officer

attributes.content: The only thing I'm thinking is this: if you take even one more step forward, you'll pay the full price for it.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The only way you'll be going any further into Kjerag is over my dead body!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Back already? What're the commander's orders?
attributes.name: Victorian Guard A

attributes.content: No changes. We keep guarding this final checkpoint. Once all their people are in, they'll definitely find Kjerag's arsenal.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard B

attributes.content: They've been searching for ages now, but they still haven't found anything?
attributes.name: Victorian Guard A

attributes.content: Yep. Even if Kjerag can't make any big moves like they said, I'm not willing to bet that that Enciodes guy doesn't have something up his sleeve.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard B

attributes.content: Maybe—Hmm? Another transport truck.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard A

attributes.content: Well, this one's all yours, buddy. I'm all tired out from checking all those beans last truck.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard B

attributes.content: Fine.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard A

attributes.content: The guard waves down the truck slowly approaching him. It obediently comes to a halt.
Sorry, mister, but as per Her Grace's orders, all vehicles passing this point are to be searched.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard A

attributes.content: Unload your cargo—
attributes.name: Victorian Guard A

attributes.content: A thick baton smacks into his head with a 'bonk'. Before the other guard can cry out for help, a shadow appears behind him, tightening itself around his neck.
We've cleared the road again, sir, just like the plan said.
attributes.name: Kjerag Warrior

attributes.content: Update Sir Gnosis on the situation.
Get those supplies transported. We can't keep him waiting.
She is unsure whose blood is blurring her sight as it runs down her cheek into the corner of her mouth.
She tastes an iron tang she has not tasted in a while.
Her twin degenbrechers quiver as they fend off blades coming at her from all directions. While her enemies' wily tricks have left wounds all over her body, she has not taken a single step back.
Seven or eight of her foes lie slumped on the floor around her.
Pah...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: *cough*...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: You are at your limit, Black Knight.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: In truth, you can still choose to lay down your arms and surrender.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: You're all mouth.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Lock up your silver tongues and come at me if you're brave enough.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Even you must bleed.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: Would you not regret dying here, Knight?
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: ...Hmph.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Meaningless drivel when said to someone—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Who holds their own life cheap.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Clang—!
She takes advantage of her foe's moment of complacency, sending him flying.
Most times, she could not let out a blow this strong. But now, her strength is fueled by a rage that had not burned in a very long time.
The mere sight of the scar-laden knight's furious form is enough to strike fear into the hearts of her enemies.
Some of them take half a step back.
What're you so afraid of?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The knight takes a shaky step forward, leaving behind two trails of blood upon the ground.
Her eyes shine brighter than ever, but it is the shine of bloodshot eyes. Her body is fast losing its ability to stand, yet her unwavering fervor still flows. From where, she does not know.
The candles of the hall slowly extinguish. The reflections on the floor become all the more blurry.
In the end, she staggers...
Several smoke grenades fly into the courtyard, covering everything in a cloud of fumes.
Who's there?!
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: They aren't Court guards. Someone our intelligence didn't account for is intervening. We can't continue the mission.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: Abort mission, retreat with the wounded.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: Made it right on time...
Victoria's elite hooligans won't be sorted that easily. We need to find somewhere safe.
Wake up. This is no time for a nap.
*cough* You're...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Sharp?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Take it easy with the talking, you're wounded.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: Did the Doctor send you?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: SilverAsh has been in contact with the Doctor the whole time. After hearing about the Catastrophe in Kjerag, the Doctor figured you'd run into trouble.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: While we do have our hands pretty full at the moment, the Doctor did promise that if you ever found yourselves in a pinch, we wouldn't just stand back and watch.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: I've already called Rhodes Island for reinforcements, they should be here any minute now.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: What about Enciodes?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: No need to worry. I believe SilverAsh has managed to take the reins of this situation.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: Just hang in there, Degenbrecher. You're through the hardest part now.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: ...Are we able to maintain our current output?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Yes sir, ammunition stocks will be as expected. But, Chairman Edelweiss...
attributes.name: Factory Foreman

attributes.content: I can't help but doubt things. If what we're facing is the Duke of Caster's fleet, then even if we raised our efficiency tenfold, we still wouldn't be able to compete with them.
attributes.name: Factory Foreman

attributes.content: No need to worry. Just follow the plan.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: We'll handle the rest.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I've worked for Karlan Trade for eleven years now, Chairman. I know what it's brought to Kjerag.
attributes.name: Factory Foreman

attributes.content: I believe in the both of you.
attributes.name: Factory Foreman

attributes.content: It seems you're ready now.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I suppose you don't need me for any further reminders, Master of Clan Silverash.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Since this is to be a negotiation, I thought I would change into something more formal.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Caster's army has laid siege to Kjerag, while her advance forces have control over several of our streets, forcing the civilians back into their homes.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Arctosz has brought his men to confront the Victorians, but they are a frail force in comparison.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The Duke's envoy came by Karlan Trade, asking me to pass you an 'invitation' to the negotiating table.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: She is waiting for you, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It sounds like the situation is still within our expectations.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Look at you, admiring this lonely battleship... Does it not seem too weak as it is now?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Lately, I have found myself often thinking about a day from many years ago. The day my parents received an invitation from Clan Browntail.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: My father told me that the reason why the Browntails and the Paleroches did not support us was because they had not seen what he had seen.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: 'If someone can take a step forward, even if it is only a single step...'
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Even if it is the infamous Luca Browntail.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: They knew of the worst-case scenario, but they did not hesitate.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Now I am at the age at which they passed away. Looking back, it seems that some things haven't changed.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But at least now I know why they did not hesitate.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: In the wake of their passing, I followed my clan as we left Kjerag to head to Victoria.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It was a rough start. I was learning almost out of habit as I got used to the disdainful looks of my Victorian classmates.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The only thing that kept me going was the knowledge that one day, I would return to Kjerag.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: But in the end, you went to Victoria too.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I fear I shall never forget the look on your face when I first greeted you at school.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...I was simply surprised by the way you greeted me, asking me if I still remembered our childhood promise like some sort of naive fool.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: 'Do you still want to make Kjerag big enough for the both of us?'
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But it was also what convinced me that everything you said, the future you envisioned, was no mere fantasy.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Thus, I hitched my rope to Karlan Trade, which leads me to today.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Today is far from enough, Gnosis.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am about to meet with the house, the most ruthless of creditors...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...No matter if I am there to see it or not, I will give Kjerag a tomorrow.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Finally, I want you to know that it's not just us supporting you. Many other people of Kjerag do too.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Karlan Trade's years of toil were not for nothing.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: If you were to ask me what I had wished to hear at this very moment...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You always were able to get people to tell you exactly that.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Do you have an example?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Like when you told Degenbrecher you would treat her as nothing more than a pawn, and that when her contract expired, it was up to her if she stayed in Kjerag.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: But you already knew her answer.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Perhaps why I wish to hear such words is precisely because I am not so sure you would give me such answers.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Hah, are you afraid?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: When I declared I would make Kjerag into a grand stage big enough for us more than twenty years ago, I had signed away all rights to be afraid.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You have experienced it for yourself. I am sure you have not forgotten.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...But at times, I too need a few words of encouragement.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: So, have Degenbrecher and I managed to provide you with them?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: ...Without a doubt.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am truly glad... to have you both.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Perhaps, in the Kjerag to come, we will no longer need to make these usurious deals, or rely on the Vine-Bead Court to have faith.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Perhaps, you two will have the better of me in—
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Enough with the self-flattery, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Go and see the Kjerag of your dreams for yourself.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: If you are a coward who dares not face his own dream, then so be it. Degenbrecher and I have our own things to do.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Like right now. I should go.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: As you wish.
attributes.name: Enciodes
